We are over 4,000 University employees who perform administrative, library, research and clinical work across Yale.

We are over 4,000 University employees who come from all over New Haven, Connecticut, and the world. Some of us are in our first jobs at Yale; others have built careers over decades at the University. Eighty percent of us are women. We perform a wide variety of administrative, library, research and clinical work across the University. Over the past 30 years, we have won respect for our work, significant improvements in pay and promotional opportunities, ensured the security of our jobs through the Interim Employment Pool, and maintained excellent and affordable health care options.

Get in touch with Local 34-UNITE HERE — the Union of Clerical & Technical Workers at Yale.

## Reach Out to Local 34

We’re here to answer questions about membership, contracts, and how we can support you. Reach us by phone, email, or stop by our office in New Haven.

### Office Location

**Local 34-UNITE HERE!**  
425 College Street, 2nd Floor  
New Haven, CT 06511

Our office is in the heart of New Haven, near the Yale campus. We welcome members and anyone interested in learning more about the union.

### Phone & Fax

- **Phone:** [203-624-5161](tel:+12036245161)
- **Fax:** 203-776-6438

### Email

- **General inquiries:** [34@yaleunions.org](mailto:34@yaleunions.org)

For contract, grievance, or membership questions, email us and a staff member or officer will get back to you.

### Press outreach

- **Ian Dunn:** [dunn@yaleunions.org](mailto:dunn@yaleunions.org)
